page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 6462C processor. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 32 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The processor operates at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz, delivering consistent processing capabilities for compute-bound tasks.

The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage volumes for persistent data. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput communication with other cloud resources and network storage services.

Given the dedicated physical core allocation and high clock frequency, this server is designed for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance without resource contention. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-heavy tasks that do not require local storage or GPU acceleration. Suitable workloads include high-performance web serving, application servers, build systems, and distributed computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading. The instance features 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It contains no local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads, application servers, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring consistent CPU performance and high network throughput.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon compute instance with high clock speeds and balanced memory for demanding enterprise workloads.
